tool_name: Roller Bearing L10h Life & Modified Lnm Life (ISO 281)

inputs.name: Bearing Type
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Load Exponent (p)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Dynamic Load Rating (C)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Fatigue Load Limit (Pu)
inputs.hint: From bearing catalog — ISO 281 Annex A
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Equivalent Dynamic Load (P)
inputs.hint: P = X*Fr + Y*Fa (combined radial and axial force)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Radial Force (Fr)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 IT5 — Precision grinding tolerance: 4-18µm (≈0.5% for Ø10-50mm)

inputs.name: Axial Force (Fa)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Operating Speed (n)
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 60034-1:2017 §8.4 — Speed tolerance: ±1% at rated load

inputs.name: Reliability Factor (a1)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: a1 Numeric Value
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Viscosity Ratio (kappa = nu/nu1)
inputs.hint: kappa = actual viscosity / ISO 281 nominal reference viscosity. kappa < 1 indicates boundary lubrication
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Contamination Factor (eC)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: eC Numeric Value
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Target Bearing Life
inputs.hint: Typical: electric motors 20,000h | gearboxes 30,000h | heavy machinery 60,000h
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Discrete count variable, zero measurement uncertainty

formulas: L10_million_rev = POWER(dynamic_load_C_kN / equiv_load_P_kN, load_exponent_p)   // [10^6 rev] Basic L10 life — ISO 281 Clause 5
L10h = (L10_million_rev * 1000000) / (60 * rpm)   // [hours] L10 life in hours — 90% reliability
a_ISO_factor = 0.1 * POWER(MAX(0.001, 1 - (fatigue_limit_Pu_kN * contamination_ec_val / equiv_load_P_kN)), 1.5) * SQRT(viscosity_ratio_kappa)   // [—] ISO life factor — ISO 281:2007 Annex A
Lnm = reliability_a1_val * a_ISO_factor * L10h   // [hours] Modified bearing life (Lnm)
Life_Reduction_Pct = (1 - Lnm / L10h) * 100   // [%] Modified life reduction (due to contamination and viscosity)
Load_Ratio = equiv_load_P_kN / dynamic_load_C_kN   // [—] P/C ratio — should be low (<0.5 is ideal)
Maintenance_Interval_h = Lnm * 0.1   // [hours] Recommended relubrication interval (10% of Lnm)

overload_check.error_msg: MECHANICAL IMPOSSIBILITY: P >= C. Operating load exceeds dynamic capacity. L10 is less than 1 million revolutions. Bearing will fail immediately; selection is incorrect.

rpm_minimum.error_msg: Speed cannot be zero — division by zero in L10h calculation.

contamination_range.error_msg: eC contamination factor must be between 0 and 0.80 (ISO 281 Annex A Table A.4).

load_ratio_extreme.error_msg: P/C ratio > 0.8: Bearing is severely overloaded. Minimum L10 life is less than 2 million revolutions. Select a larger bearing series.

smart_warnings.message: CRITICAL LUBRICATION DEFICIENCY: kappa < 0.4. Rolling elements are in direct contact; EHD film does not form. Metal-on-metal wear initiated. Lnm calculation unreliable. Higher viscosity oil or lower speed is mandatory.
Insufficient oil film: kappa between 0.4 and 1.0. Partial EHD film. Fatigue life is significantly below theoretical values. Optimize oil selection or evaluate viscosity-enhancing additives.
High contamination: eC < 0.30. Abrasive particles are destroying the raceways. Upgrade filter class to ISO 4406 <= 16/14/11. Evaluate shielded/sealed bearing types.
INSUFFICIENT MODIFIED LIFE: Lnm is less than 50% of target life. Bearing will fail prematurely under current conditions. Larger series, better lubrication, or lower load is required.
P/C > 0.5: High load ratio. A larger bearing series should be evaluated. P/C <= 0.2 is ideal for long service life.
L10h < 20,000 hours: This is the industrial minimum for electric motors. Current design is insufficient. Increase bearing size or reduce load.

fmea.effect: MECHANICAL IMPOSSIBILITY: P >= C. Operating load exceeds dynamic capacity. L10 is less than 1 million revolutions. Bearing will fail immediately; selection is incorrect.
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: eC contamination factor must be between 0 and 0.80 (ISO 281 Annex A Table A.4).
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: P/C ratio > 0.8: Bearing is severely overloaded. Minimum L10 life is less than 2 million revolutions. Select a larger bearing series.
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: CRITICAL LUBRICATION DEFICIENCY: kappa < 0.4. Rolling elements are in direct contact; EHD film does not form. Metal-on-metal wear initiated. Lnm calculation unreliable. Higher viscosity oil or lower speed is mandatory.
Insufficient oil film: kappa between 0.4 and 1.0. Partial EHD film. Fatigue life is significantly below theoretical values. Optimize oil selection or evaluate viscosity-enhancing additives.
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: viscosity_ratio_kappa >= 0.4 && viscosity_ratio_kappa < 1.0

fmea.failureMode: High contamination: eC < 0.30. Abrasive particles are destroying the raceways. Upgrade filter class to ISO 4406 <= 16/14/11. Evaluate shielded/sealed bearing types.
INSUFFICIENT MODIFIED LIFE: Lnm is less than 50% of target life. Bearing will fail prematurely under current conditions. Larger series, better lubrication, or lower load is required.
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Lnm < target_life_hours * 0.5

fmea.failureMode: P/C > 0.5: High load ratio. A larger bearing series should be evaluated. P/C <= 0.2 is ideal for long service life.
L10h < 20,000 hours: This is the industrial minimum for electric motors. Current design is insufficient. Increase bearing size or reduce load.
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: L10h < 20000 && target_life_hours >= 20000
